name: Playground
subtitle: The Body's Expedition Log
desc: Not a playground for children — a proving ground for the spirit made flesh. Each sport is a different terrain on this ever-shifting island: deep-sea ruins for diving, alpine peaks for skiing, vertical cliffs for climbing, underground arenas for boxing, and neon streets for skateboarding. The body learns. The island remembers.

sections.name: Deep Memory Archive
sections.desc: Diving certs, ocean photos, dive logs, fish records, depth records, underwater videos

sections.name: Frost Ridge
sections.desc: Ski logs, mountain photos, gear config

sections.name: The Ascent
sections.desc: Route records, grade progression, climbing photos

sections.name: Underground Arena
sections.desc: Training logs, sparring footage, technique notes

sections.name: Neon Drift
sections.desc: Trick progression, spot maps, session footage

sections.name: Hall of Proof
sections.desc: All achievement certificates across all sports
